arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Real Sociedad 1-4 Real Madrid; Liga F 2024/2025
arts.sum: Despite having a noticeably better half than Las Blancas, it took only one action for Real Madrid to make it 3 and it was pushed in by their own player. 27’: GOAL (0-2) by Signe Bruun: this time it was an action on the left-hand side led by Athenea.

arts.ttl: Official: Long-time Real Madrid transfer target signs new contract
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Tuesday been dealt something of a blow on the transfer front. This comes amid confirmation that Alphonso Davies has put pen to paper…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid are 'in EMERGENCY' ahead of Man City clash, Carlo Ancelotti admits - as he reveals extend of defensive injury crisis
arts.sum: The defending European champions, who beat Borussia Dortmund in last year's final, ended up with the tie of the round when they were drawn to face Manchester City in the play-off round.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso next Real Madrid manager gets firm answer as Bayer Leverkusen chief speaks out
arts.sum: The Spaniard has been heavily linked with succeeding Carlo Ancelotti at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid Didn't Sign Anyone in the January Transfer Window
arts.sum: Real Madrid opted not to sign any new first team players in the January transfer window despite a growing injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid miss out on Alphonso Davies as Canadian star renews with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Canadian star Alphonso Davies has renewed with German giants Bayern Munich in a deal keeping him at the club until at least 2030. This is a hammer blow for Real…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti names Real Madrid’s only 3 centre-back options after double injury blow
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has named the three players whom he will be forced to rely upon to man the heart of the club’s defence over the coming…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Copa del Rey Quarterfinals against Leganes
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s Copa del Rey Quarterfinals against Leganes. A depleted squad list from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies signs Bayern Munich extension amid Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: When that move did not materialise, Madrid remained keen on bringing in Davies on a free transfer this summer as part of an overhaul of the defence that they also hope will see the arrival of Trent Alexander-Arnold, whose Liverpool contract also expires at the end of the season. Alphonso Davies has agreed a new contract at Bayern Munich keeping him there, the Bundesliga club has announced on Tuesday, bringing an end to Real Madrid's long-term pursuit of the player.

arts.ttl: Two weeks that will make or break Real Madrid’s season
arts.sum: After the loss to Barcelona last month, the forthcoming fortnight sees ‘Los Blancos’ play key games in the Copa del Rey along with a monumental Champions League two legged playoff tie against Manchester City. The Copa del Rey, LaLiga, Champions League, FIFA Club World Cup and Spanish Super Cup offered the other pathways to seventh heaven glory.
